region_mappings.provenance: computed: lesion mask intersect DK+aseg labelmap in MNI152 1mm space. ATLAS 3.0 native scanner space (brain-extracted T1w) -> MNI152 dipy affine registration (mutual information), mask warped nearest-neighbour. Labelmap voxelized from the atlas meshes (nearest-region assignment within the MNI152 brain mask), so labels are the regions.json ids. role=primary when overlap_fraction_of_region >= 0.10. Registration and voxel parcellation are approximate; pending expert review. stroke lesion = ATLAS manual lesion segmentation (sub-r009s052), BIDS space-orig. The Training Raw release is not MNI-normalized, so the lesion reaches atlas space via its own T1w, not by assumption.
